title: Torollo Roadmap
description: A guided, auto-corrected learning roadmap. Purely declarative data: validators are { type, params } objects interpreted by the Torollo engine — a roadmap never contains executable code. See docs/roadmap-format.md.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this schema's URL, for editor autocompletion.

schemaVersion.description: Format version. This schema describes version 1. Readers must reject files with an unsupported version.

id.description: Stable roadmap identifier. Progression is keyed on it — never change it once published.

title.description: Human-readable roadmap title, in the roadmap's language.

description.description: Short summary shown in the catalog and player.

language.description: Language of all texts in this file (e.g. "en", "fr", "pt-BR"). One language per file; a translation is a separate file with the same id.

estimatedMinutes.description: Rough total completion time, in minutes.

prerequisites.description: Free-form human prerequisites (e.g. "Docker installed"). Not machine-resolved references.

id.description: Stable step identifier, unique within the roadmap and independent of the step's position. Progression is keyed on it.

instruction.description: What the learner must do. Markdown is allowed.

hints.description: Ordered progressive hints, revealed one at a time (hint 1 first).

solution.description: Full solution, revealed only after all hints. Always explicit — never encoded as the last hint.

type.description: Validator type name, dispatched by the engine (e.g. "container_running"). Unknown types are reported by the engine, not by this schema.

params.description: Inert JSON data interpreted by the validator implementation shipped with Torollo. Per-type shape is documented in docs/roadmap-format.md.
